text.tspan: A REPEATING PATTERN OF REGULAR AND POINTER CONES
INDICATES A LIMIT TO THE TRACK

text.inkscape:label: origin text
text.tspan: Regular cone origin is in the center of the cirlce
Single pointer cone triangle origin is at the vertex of the 2 long sides
Combo regular and pointer cone origin is at the center of the circle.
The triangle origin is offset so that it rotates around the circle center.
THE COMBINATION OF A REGULAR AND POINTER CONE
INDICATES THE SIDE THE CAR MUST PASS ON
POINTER CONES REPRESENT A TRAFFIC CONE LAYING ON ITS SIDE
REGULAR CONES REPRESENT A TRAFFIC CONE STANDING UPRIGHT
